question: Following the U.S. executive order that terminated grants for Radio Free Europe/Radio Liberty, what operational activity was observed at its headquarters and which high-risk regions continue to receive its broadcasts?
answer: Employees were observed engaged in tasks at desks with multiple computer monitors in an open-plan office, with journalists continuing work and publishing stories. The organization continues broadcasting to Iran, Russia, Belarus, and war-torn Ukraine.

video: Inside the building, an open-plan office space is bustling with activity; employees are seated at desks equipped with multiple computer monitors, engaged in various tasks.
text: Journalists at Radio Free Europe/Radio Liberty continued working on Monday with stories appearing on its website.
Radio Free Europe/Radio Liberty broadcasts to countries including Iran, Russia, Belarus, and war-torn Ukraine.
